message:
Fix: hookTestCmd validation and Python fallback caution handling

Two bugs fixed:

1. hookTestCmd had inconsistent Args validation:
   - Args: MaximumNArgs(1) allowed 0 args
   - But runHookTest returned error if no args (now panics after refactor)
   - Changed to ExactArgs(1) and Use: "test <command>"
   - Updated test command setup to match

2. Python hook fallback logic for caution tier:
   - is_blocked() returned True for caution, causing action="block"
   - The elif tier == 'caution' branch was unreachable
   - Removed is_blocked() call, now directly checks tier
   - Caution correctly returns action="ask" (matches daemon behavior)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
